overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in period clothing walking through a historic residential district at night. The scene features gas street lamps illuminating Victorian-style houses, with a horse-drawn carriage passing by on the dirt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic residential street with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a dirt road through a residential district, passing wooden fences and historic houses

entered.detail: tall wooden plank fence running along the right side of the dirt road
two-story Victorian-style wooden houses with lit windows and porches
cast iron gas lamps emitting warm yellow light along the roadside
unpaved road surface with visible wheel ruts and patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a quiet residential dirt road at night, illuminated by warm gas street lamps. Wooden fences line the right side while historic two-story houses with glowing windows stand on the left. The atmosphere is calm and empty of other people or vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: wealthy mansion district with ornate iron fencing

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the left and passes by the character
environment shifts from modest wooden houses to large mansions with ornate iron gates

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the road as a carriage passes by, then proceeding past gated mansions

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving in the same direction, overtaking the character on the left

entered.detail: wooden carriage with two horses and a driver, lit by carriage lamps
black wrought iron fencing with stone pillars surrounding mansion properties
grand three-story estate with columns and extensive grounds behind iron gates

segments.scene_description: A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left, moving ahead down the road. The character continues walking into a more affluent district featuring large mansions surrounded by ornate wrought iron fences and stone gates. The carriage remains visible in the distance ahead as the character progresses past the grand estates.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet residential district that gradually transitions into a more affluent neighborhood of grand estates. It begins with a character walking down a calm dirt road at night, flanked by wooden fences and two-story houses with glowing windows under the warm light of gas street lamps. As the character progresses, a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the left and moves ahead into the distance. The scene then shifts as the modest homes give way to a wealthier district featuring large mansions enclosed by ornate wrought iron fences and stone gates. The camera continues to follow the character past these imposing estates while the carriage remains a distant silhouette on the road ahead.
